title: Plan Iteration 1.2: read scope, create feature tick structure, begin first task
description:
## Objective
Real work for the next iteration, not a handoff. By the end of this task the first concrete task of iteration 1.2 should be in flight.

## Implementation
1. Read .devmeta/increments/increment-1-kpv/_overview.md, section 'Iteration 1.2'
2. Invoke skill: /devmeta:plan-iteration 1.2
3. The skill will: create iteration 1.2 plan.md and status.md, create feature spec + context-log under .devmeta/projects/, create feature epic + tasks under iteration 1.2 (id 3a3) in tk, then immediately tk next and start executing
4. Do not stop at the planning boundary — continue into the first task of 1.2

## Tests
tk list --parent 3a3 — feature epic with tasks present.
Do NOT close until the first task of 1.2 is in flight (or the structure is in place and tk next returns it).
acceptance_criteria: Iteration 1.2 feature/tasks created in tk and first task is in flight
